tasks.subject: Task 0: Monorepo scaffolding
tasks.description: pnpm workspace with shared/api/worker packages, tsconfig.base, .env.example. Verify: pnpm install && pnpm -r build.

tasks.subject: Task 1: Config loader + secret crypto
tasks.description: zod config loader + AES-256-GCM crypto in @jigit/shared (TDD). Verify: pnpm --filter @jigit/shared test.

tasks.subject: Task 2: Prisma schema + migration
tasks.description: Postgres schema (AgentTemplate, Credential, RepoMapping, Job, JobStep, JobEvent, Approval) + client. Verify: prisma validate.

tasks.subject: Task 3: Branch-name derivation
tasks.description: deriveBranchName + extractIssueKey, pure (TDD). Verify: pnpm --filter @jigit/shared test branch.

tasks.subject: Task 4: Bounded retry policy
tasks.description: withRetry with backoff (TDD). Verify: pnpm --filter @jigit/shared test retry.

tasks.subject: Task 5: Queue + events + shared barrel
tasks.description: BullMQ factory, Redis pub/sub, JigitJobData, barrel export. Verify: shared build + test.

tasks.subject: Task 6: Webhook normalization
tasks.description: Pure normalizeJira + dedupeKey (TDD); gitlab stub. Verify: api test normalize.

tasks.subject: Task 7: Fastify server + webhook receivers + enqueue
tasks.description: Fastify /health + webhook verify/normalize + dedupe Job create + enqueue. Verify: api test.

tasks.subject: Task 8: Integration adapters (Jira/GitLab/Git/Telegram)
tasks.description: Interface-first adapters wrapped in withRetry, mockable. Verify: worker test adapters.

tasks.subject: Task 9: ACP client wrapping Claude Code
tasks.description: AcpSession over stdio: init/session/prompt, stream updates, bridge permissions, accumulate tokens (TDD fake agent). Verify: worker test acp.

tasks.subject: Task 10: LangGraph job graph + checkpointer + nodes
tasks.description: StateGraph lifecycle nodes, JobStep/JobEvent writes, Postgres checkpointer, stop/pause (TDD faked deps). Verify: worker test graph.

tasks.subject: Task 11: Approval bridge (Telegram + dashboard + resume)
tasks.description: ACP permission -> Approval(pending) -> notify -> block until resolved/timeout; idempotent. Verify: worker/api approval tests.

tasks.subject: Task 12: REST job API + SSE + control endpoints
tasks.description: list/detail jobs, SSE, control, approve/reject, read-only config. Verify: api test jobs.

tasks.subject: Task 13: Worker/API entrypoints + seed script
tasks.description: Runnable worker (concurrency, real adapters, control sub) + API main + seed. Verify: pnpm -r build.

tasks.subject: Task 14: Dashboard (React + Vite + shadcn/ui)
tasks.description: Overview mock charts, Jobs list, Job detail (SSE+controls+approve), read-only Config. Verify: dashboard test + build.

tasks.subject: Task 15: docker-compose + E2E smoke
tasks.description: compose (pg/redis/api/worker) + E2E webhook->opening_mr with faked adapters. Verify: JIGIT_FAKE_ADAPTERS=1 pnpm test:e2e.
